original_registry_entry.issuing_organisation: National Institute for Health and Care Excellence
original_registry_entry.population: Adults, children, and young people with overweight, obesity, or central adiposity, subject to section-specific age criteria.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Identification, sensitive discussion, assessment, behavioural intervention, referral, and follow-up.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for selected permission-sensitive adult weight discussion, measurements, context, previous attempts, goals, clinician-discussed intervention or referral, and follow-up fields. It does not support automatic advice, medicine selection, dosing, or UAE referral pathways.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 1.9.1–1.9.17 — permission, measurements, and adult assessment
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports avoiding diagnostic overshadowing, asking permission before weight discussion or measurements, and recording height, weight, BMI, waist or waist-to-height context and weight-related health risk.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 1.11.1–1.11.14 — results, context, intervention discussion, and referral
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports comorbidity, social or mental-health context, diet or activity goals, previous attempts, experiences, barriers, preferences, clinician-agreed intervention, and preference-sensitive referral documentation.

exact_sections.heading: Behavioural intervention recommendations — goals, progress, feedback, and follow-up
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting personalised goals, progress, barriers, support, and clinician-arranged review without inserting automatic lifestyle instructions.

title: Overweight and obesity management
publisher: National Institute for Health and Care Excellence
population: Adults, children, and young people with overweight, obesity, or central adiposity, subject to section-specific age criteria.
intended_setting: Identification, sensitive discussion, assessment, behavioural intervention, referral, and follow-up.
